title: AgentOps Skill Catalog
description: Generated inventory of skills/*/SKILL.md with queryable metadata. Source of truth: scripts/generate-skill-catalog.sh. Regenerate on every SKILL.md edit; CI gate validate-skill-catalog-drift refuses drift.

schema_version.description: Bumped when schema changes; consumers gate on this.

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp from the generator run that emitted this file.

skill_count.description: Number of entries in `skills`. Must match `skills | length`.

name.description: Skill slug = directory name under skills/.

description.description: One-line summary lifted from SKILL.md frontmatter.

consumes.description: Port / sibling-skill names this skill reads from.

produces.description: Port / artifact names this skill writes.

practices.description: Optional engineering practices the skill applies (tdd, bdd-gherkin, ...).

user_invocable.description: True when the skill is meant to be invoked directly by an operator (`user-invocable: true` in frontmatter).

codex_override_present.description: True when skills-codex/<name>/SKILL.md or skills-codex-overrides/<name>/ exists.
